info.title: ScrimFinder Training Service
info.description:
Game ingestion, feature extraction, dataset management, ML training and model registry.

**Student:** Rodrigo Neto (fc59850)

parameters.name: game_id

schema.description: Stored game id. Riot ids like REGION_MATCHID are supported.
schema.title: Game Id

parameters.description: Stored game id. Riot ids like REGION_MATCHID are supported.

schema.title: Response Get Features Api V1 Training Features  Game Id  Get

game_id.title: Game Id
game_id.description: Stored game id. Riot-style ids like 'VN_1417849076' are supported. You can derive this from LeagueOfGraphs match URLs, e.g. https://www.leagueofgraphs.com/match/vn/1417849076#participant8 -> VN_1417849076.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional custom match id. Prefer Riot format REGION_MATCHID (example: VN_1417849076).

dataset_id.title: Dataset Id
dataset_id.description: Leave empty to train from EUW DB directly.
